name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-4
title: no test asserts feature.json files validate against feature.json.schema.json
description: There is no test under test/ that exercises feature.json.schema.json against any real feature.json. test-schemas-valid-json.py only checks the schemas are valid JSON, not that consumers conform. As a result, the schema can drift from real files (see CONTRACT-BUG-4 — bugs_root required by schema but no real feature.json has it). Add a test that loads each feature.json in the repo and validates against feature.json.schema.json using jsonschema.
